_meta.description: Staylocalx Instagram publisher registry. Read by N8N Code Job Builder on every Telegram command.

/publish_tut01_en.caption:
Onboard your property in under 5 minutes. ⚡

Step-by-step: from zero to a live digital guide your guests can scan with their phone camera.

What's inside this carousel ⤵️

• Sign up & confirm your email
• Pick your role (Owner)
• Add your first property
• Name, location, photos, guest capacity
• You're live — ready for Tutorial 02

Save this for when you're ready to set up. Comment ASK if anything's unclear and I'll walk you through it. 👇

Tutorial 02 is dropping next — we'll customize your guide so guests actually use it.

#vacationrental #airbnbhost #shorttermrental #hostlife #staylocalx #passiveincome #propertyowner #vacationrentalowner #airbnbtips #hosttips

targets.name: @thestaylocalx
targets.caption:
We're live. 🚀

After months of building, Staylocalx is now available for property owners worldwide.

Here's the simple version:

• You have a vacation rental, villa, or short-term let
• Your guests always ask "where should we eat tonight?"
• Right now, those recommendations earn you nothing

Staylocalx fixes that. ⚡

You get a free digital guide your guests scan with their phone camera — no app to download, no friction. Local restaurants, activities, and services pay you a commission every time your guest actually visits (GPS-verified, so you only get paid for real foot traffic).

The split: 70% stays with you. Always.
Average potential: up to €500/mo in additional passive income.
Setup time: 5 minutes.

Tutorial 01 is live on this account if you want to see exactly how to onboard your first property.

If you've ever thought "I should be getting paid for these recommendations" — this is for you. 👇

Link in bio. Free to start.

#vacationrental #airbnbhost #shorttermrental #hostlife #vacationrentalowner #passiveincome #propertyowner #airbnbtips #hosttips #staylocalx #welive #launch

targets.caption:
We're live in the UK. 🚀

After months of building, Staylocalx is now available for holiday let owners across the Cotswolds, Lake District, Cornwall, Scottish Highlands, Pembrokeshire and beyond.

Here's the simple version:

• You own a holiday let, cottage, B&B or short-stay property
• Your guests always ask "where should we eat tonight?"
• Right now, those recommendations earn you nothing

Staylocalx fixes that. ⚡

You get a free digital guide your guests scan with their phone camera — no app to download, no faff. Local restaurants, pubs, activities and services pay you a commission every time your guest actually visits (GPS-verified, you only get paid for real footfall).

The split: 70% stays with you. Always.
Average potential: up to £400/mo in additional passive income per property.
Setup time: 5 minutes.

If you've ever thought "I should be getting paid for these recommendations" — this is for you. 👇

Link in bio. Free to start.

#holidaylet #shorttermrental #airbnbhost #airbnbhostUK #cotswolds #lakedistrict #cornwall #scottishhighlands #vacationrental #propertyowner #hosttips #staylocalx #welive

targets.name: @staylocalx.es
targets.caption:
Por fin estamos aquí. 🚀

Después de meses construyendo, Staylocalx ya está disponible para propietarios en todo el mundo.

La idea es sencilla:

• Tienes un apartamento turístico, villa o alquiler vacacional
• Tus huéspedes siempre preguntan "¿dónde podemos cenar esta noche?"
• Ahora mismo, esas recomendaciones no te generan nada

Staylocalx lo arregla. ⚡

Recibes una guía digital gratuita que tus huéspedes abren con la cámara del móvil — sin descargar ninguna app, sin fricción. Los restaurantes, actividades y servicios locales te pagan una comisión cada vez que tu huésped realmente los visita (verificación por GPS, así que solo cobras visitas reales).

Reparto: 70% se queda contigo. Siempre.
Potencial: hasta €500/mes de ingresos pasivos extra.
Tiempo de configuración: 5 minutos.

Si alguna vez has pensado "debería estar cobrando por estas recomendaciones" — esto es para ti. 👇

Enlace en bio. Empezar es gratis.

#alquilervacacional #propietarios #airbnbespaña #turismorural #anfitrion #ingresosextra #alquilerturistico #staylocalx #lanzamiento

Potencial: hasta $10,000 MXN/mes de ingresos pasivos extra.
Configuración: 5 minutos.

Si alguna vez has pensado "debería estar cobrando por estas recomendaciones" — esto es para ti. 👇

Link en bio. Empezar es gratis.

targets.name: @staylocalx.uae
targets.caption:
We're live in the UAE. 🚀

Staylocalx is now available for premium property owners across Dubai, Abu Dhabi, and the Emirates.

The proposition is simple:

• You own a luxury villa, premium apartment, or holiday home
• Your guests constantly ask for restaurant and experience recommendations
• Right now, those recommendations generate zero return for you

Staylocalx changes that. ✨

A premium digital guide your guests access by scanning a discreet QR code with their phone camera — no app to download, designed to match the standards your guests expect. Curated local restaurants, experiences, and concierge services pay you a commission every time your guest actually visits (GPS-verified, you only get paid for real visits).

The split: 70% stays with you. Always.
Potential: up to AED 2,000/mo in additional passive income per property.
Setup time: 5 minutes.

If you've ever thought "I should be earning from these recommendations" — this is for you. 👇

Link in bio. Free to start.

#dubaiproperty #abudhabiproperty #uaeproperty #luxuryvilla #premiumrental #holidayhomedubai #hostlife #passiveincome #staylocalx #welive

targets.name: @staylocalx.it
targets.caption:
Finalmente siamo qui. 🚀

Dopo mesi di lavoro, Staylocalx è ora disponibile per proprietari di case vacanze in tutto il mondo.

L'idea è semplice:

• Hai un appartamento turistico, una villa o una casa vacanze
• I tuoi ospiti chiedono sempre "dove possiamo cenare stasera?"
• In questo momento, quelle raccomandazioni non ti generano nulla

Staylocalx risolve tutto questo. ⚡

Ricevi una guida digitale gratuita che i tuoi ospiti aprono con la fotocamera del telefono — senza scaricare nessuna app, senza attriti. Ristoranti, attività e servizi locali ti pagano una commissione ogni volta che il tuo ospite li visita davvero (verifica GPS, paghi solo le visite reali).

Divisione: il 70% resta a te. Sempre.
Potenziale: fino a €500/mese di reddito passivo extra.
Tempo di configurazione: 5 minuti.

Se hai mai pensato "dovrei essere pagato per queste raccomandazioni" — questo è per te. 👇

Link in bio. Iniziare è gratis.

#casavacanze #affittibrevi #airbnbitalia #proprietari #anfitrione #redditopassivo #affittoturistico #staylocalx #lancio

targets.name: @staylocalx.fr
targets.caption:
On y est. 🚀

Après des mois de développement, Staylocalx est désormais disponible pour les propriétaires de gîtes, chambres d'hôtes et locations saisonnières en Provence, sur la Côte d'Azur, en Bretagne, en Alsace et partout en France.

L'idée est simple :

• Vous avez un gîte, un appartement de vacances ou une chambre d'hôtes
• Vos hôtes vous demandent toujours « où dîner ce soir ? »
• Aujourd'hui, ces recommandations ne vous rapportent rien

Staylocalx change la donne. ⚡

Vous obtenez un guide digital gratuit que vos hôtes ouvrent avec l'appareil photo de leur téléphone — sans application à télécharger, sans friction. Restaurants, activités et services locaux vous versent une commission chaque fois que votre hôte les visite réellement (vérification par GPS, vous n'êtes payé que pour les visites réelles).

Répartition : 70% pour vous. Toujours.
Potentiel : jusqu'à €500/mois de revenus passifs supplémentaires.
Temps de configuration : 5 minutes.

Si vous avez déjà pensé « je devrais être rémunéré pour ces recommandations » — c'est pour vous. 👇

Lien en bio. C'est gratuit pour commencer.

#locationsaisonniere #gite #chambredhotes #airbnbfrance #provence #cotedazur #bretagne #alsace #revenuspassifs #staylocalx #lancement

targets.name: @thestaylocalx
targets.caption:
How often do your guests ask where to eat? 👇

We're collecting answers from hosts worldwide.

Every time a guest asks where to eat, it's free market research. They're showing you their intent. Their decision-making moment. Their willingness to spend.

And most hosts are giving away that intent for free.

Three answers below, then we'll share what we learned next week:

• Never – they figure it out themselves
• A few times a stay – I send a list once
• Constantly – they ask every single day

Drop a number 1, 2, or 3. 👇

#vacationrental #airbnbhost #shorttermrental #hostlife #propertyowner #vacationrentalowner #airbnbtips #hosttips #staylocalx

targets.name: @staylocalx.es
targets.caption:
¿Cuánto te preguntan tus huéspedes dónde comer? 👇

Estamos recogiendo respuestas de propietarios de toda España.

Cada vez que un huésped te pregunta dónde cenar es información gratis. Te está enseñando su intención. Su momento de decisión. Su disposición a gastar.

Y la mayoría de propietarios regalamos esa información sin más.

Tres opciones — comenta el número:

• 1 = Nunca, se buscan ellos la vida
• 2 = Algunas veces, mando una lista al llegar
• 3 = Constantemente, me preguntan todos los días

Comenta abajo. 👇

#alquilervacacional #propietarios #airbnbespaña #turismorural #anfitrion #alquilerturistico #staylocalx

targets.name: @staylocalx.mx
targets.caption:
¿Cuánto te preguntan tus huéspedes dónde comer? 👇

Estamos recogiendo respuestas de anfitriones de todo México.

Cada vez que un huésped te pregunta dónde cenar es información gratis. Te está enseñando su intención. Su momento de decisión. Su disposición a gastar.

Y la mayoría de anfitriones regalamos esa información sin más.

Tres opciones — comenta el número:

• 1 = Nunca, ellos se las arreglan
• 2 = A veces, les mando una lista al llegar
• 3 = Constantemente, me preguntan todos los días

Comenta abajo. 👇

#rentavacacional #airbnbmexico #airbnbhost #anfitrion #propietarios #rentaturistica #staylocalx

targets.name: @staylocalx.uae
targets.caption:
How often do your guests ask for restaurant recommendations? 👇

We're collecting answers from premium property owners across the UAE.

Every time a guest asks where to dine, it's a window into their intent. Their decision-making moment. Their willingness to spend on a curated experience.

And most owners give that intent away for free.

Three options:

• Never – my concierge handles everything
• A few times per stay – I share a curated list
• Constantly – they ask every day

Drop a 1, 2, or 3. 👇

#dubaiproperty #abudhabiproperty #uaeproperty #luxuryvilla #premiumrental #holidayhomedubai #hostlife #staylocalx

targets.name: @staylocalx.it
targets.caption:
Quanto spesso i tuoi ospiti chiedono dove mangiare? 👇

Stiamo raccogliendo risposte da proprietari di case vacanze in tutta Italia.

Ogni volta che un ospite chiede dove cenare è informazione gratuita. Ti sta mostrando la sua intenzione. Il suo momento di decisione. La sua disponibilità a spendere.

E la maggior parte dei proprietari regala quell'informazione senza ricevere nulla in cambio.

Tre opzioni — commenta il numero:

• 1 = Mai, si organizzano da soli
• 2 = Qualche volta, invio una lista all'arrivo
• 3 = Costantemente, me lo chiedono ogni giorno

Commenta qui sotto. 👇

#casavacanze #affittibrevi #airbnbitalia #proprietari #anfitrione #affittoturistico #staylocalx
